pois.name: Castle of Frost
pois.description: An ice-spire fortress crowning the northern peaks. The Frost Queen's banner hangs at half-mast.

pois.name: Castle of Flame
pois.description: A basalt keep wreathed in molten cracks. The Flame Lord rules from a throne of obsidian.

pois.name: Castle of Shadow
pois.description: Twisted spires of black stone, half-swallowed by void mist. Few who enter return.

pois.name: Castle of Storm
pois.description: A windswept fortress on high cliffs. Lightning crowns its battlements at midnight.

pois.name: North Gate
pois.description: A stone archway etched with glowing runes. Cracked open since the Starstone's return.

pois.name: East Gate
pois.description: Twin pillars frame a shimmering portal. Touch the rune-stone to bind it to your travels.

pois.name: South Gate
pois.description: Vines have crept across the runes, but the gate still hums with residual magic.

pois.name: West Gate
pois.description: A weather-worn archway above a half-buried marker stone.

pois.name: Survivors' Camp
pois.description: A handful of tents around a smoky cooking fire. The refugees here saw the castles emerge from the earth.

pois.name: Spire of Hael
pois.description: A weather-cracked tower the old hedge-wizard Hael calls home. Smoke curls from the topmost window.
